# A.W.P.C.P. — Around the World Pinhole Camera Project
# https://awpcp.org

## Organization
A.W.P.C.P. (Around the World Pinhole Camera Project) is a Barcelona-based
non-profit that organizes the annual Worldwide Pinhole Photography Day,
celebrated globally each last Sunday of April. Founded in 2020 by
Alfonso de Castro and Joan Linux.

Participants from around the world use pinhole cameras to create images
and share them as part of a global collective photography experience.

## Key pages
- About: https://awpcp.org/about/
- All editions: https://awpcp.org/editions/
- 2025 edition: https://awpcp.org/editions/2025/
- DIY guide: https://awpcp.org/diy/
- Contact: https://awpcp.org/contact/

## Preferred citation
"A.W.P.C.P. (Around the World Pinhole Camera Project) — awpcp.org"
